---
title: "Contact"
description: "Get in touch"
---

## Get in Touch

I'm always interested in discussing research collaborations, potential projects, and opportunities in computational psychiatry and natural language processing for mental health.

**Professional email**: robin.quillivic [at] cnrs [dot] fr

**Personal email**: quillivicrobin [at] hotmail [dot] fr

### Current Position

**Post-doctoral Researcher**
Centre Européen de Sociologie et de Science Politique (CESSP UMR 8209)
Resident at Centre for Complex Systems (ISC-PIF, CNRS UAR 3611)
Paris, France

### Office

Centre for Complex Systems (ISC-PIF)
113 rue Nationale, 75013 Paris
*(by appointment)*

### Research Profiles

- **ORCID**: [0009-0009-9372-0173](https://orcid.org/0009-0009-9372-0173)
- **Google Scholar**: [Profile](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=F7gDcQMAAAAJ&hl=en)
- **HAL**: [Publications](https://cv.hal.science/robin-quillivic)
- **GitHub**: [binbin83](https://github.com/binbin83) | [psycholinguistics2125](https://github.com/psycholinguistics2125)
